savedViews.saveSubtitle: Save current filters and table settings.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage stock, orders, and store performance.
auth.loginRateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again later.
auth.loginLocked: Sign-in is temporarily locked after several failed attempts.
auth.loginBackoff: Attempts are too frequent. Wait a bit and try again.
auth.emailNotVerified: Confirm your email to sign in.
auth.registrationNotCompleted: Complete business registration before signing in.
auth.inviteHint: Have an invite? Open the link from your email.

meta.title: BAZAAR
meta.description: Reliable inventory management for daily work.

meta.title: BAZAAR | Commerce operations platform
meta.description: Store-scoped products, POS, inventory, purchasing, reports, labels, catalog, and integrations for retail and wholesale teams.

hero.title: BAZAAR for trade operations.
hero.subtitle: One workspace for the daily loop: product catalog, store stock, cashier shifts, sales orders, purchase orders, reports, labels, and integrations.

console.title: Live commerce workspace
console.subtitle: Products, stock, POS, and integrations stay connected.

capabilities.title: A practical commerce system, not just a product table
capabilities.subtitle: The landing reflects the modules already present in Bazaar: store catalog, POS, stock operations, purchasing, reporting, labels, and integrations.

catalog.title: Product catalog
catalog.description: Product cards, categories, units, variants, barcodes, images, store assignment, and readiness status.

pos.title: POS and shifts
pos.description: Registers, cashier shifts, sales, receipts, payment flow, returns, and POS history.

inventory.title: Inventory by store
inventory.description: Receive stock, adjust stock, count stock, transfer between stores, and track movements.

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.description: Suppliers, purchase orders, approvals, receiving, reorder work, and purchase order PDFs.

labels.title: Barcodes and labels
labels.description: Save manufacturer barcodes, configure label profiles, and quick print product labels.

reports.title: Reports and exports
reports.description: Dashboard, sales metrics, stock reports, receipts, export jobs, and period close.

stores.title: Stores and users
stores.description: Multi-store access, user roles, store assignments, permissions, profiles, and settings.

imports.title: Imports and data
imports.description: Import products from spreadsheets, export CSV/XLSX, and keep product data structured.

workflows.title: From product setup to sale and control
workflows.subtitle: Bazaar keeps operational screens connected, so the team works in the right store context.

assortment.title: Prepare assortment
assortment.description: Build a clean store catalog before selling.
assortment.item1: Create or import products into a selected store.
assortment.item2: Capture existing manufacturer barcodes or print labels when needed.
assortment.item3: Set categories, units, variants, images, price, and minimum stock.

sell.title: Sell and record
sell.description: Cashier work stays focused on the open register and shift.
sell.item1: Scan barcode or search products in the current store.
sell.item2: Process sale, receipt, payment, return, and shift close.
sell.item3: Keep transaction currency and store context on historical records.

control.title: Review and improve
control.description: Owners and managers see the parts that need action.
control.item1: Use dashboard, reports, exports, and receipts.
control.item2: Track low stock, missing data, purchase orders, and movements.
control.item3: Sync catalog and product data through configured integrations.

integrations.title: Integrations already built into the app
integrations.subtitle: No generic promises: these are the actual integration areas present in Bazaar.

bazaarCatalog.title: Bazaar catalog
bazaarCatalog.description: Publish a public store catalog and manage product visibility per store.

bazaarApi.title: bazaar API
bazaarApi.description: Store-scoped API keys for external websites to get products and post orders.

mMarket.title: M-Market export
mMarket.description: Prepare and export product catalog data for M-Market.

bakaiStore.title: Bakai Store export
bakaiStore.description: Export products to Bakai Store templates and manage API sync settings.

imageStudio.title: Product Image Studio
imageStudio.description: Improve product photos into cleaner catalog-ready studio images.

connectors.title: Printing and fiscal connectors
connectors.description: Connector endpoints support label printing, receipt printing, and KKM queue workflows.

security.title: Store isolation and access control
security.subtitle: Bazaar separates operational data by store and role, while admins can manage the organization context.
security.item1: Cashiers can work only with assigned stores.
security.item2: Product, inventory, POS, reports, and search respect store access.
security.item3: Managers and admins get broader tools based on permissions.
security.item4: Public catalog and API access are store-scoped.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Short answers before you get started.

q1.question: Which languages are available?
q1.answer: The interface supports RU, KG, and EN.

q2.question: Can Bazaar work with multiple stores?
q2.answer: Yes. Products, inventory, POS, reports, and user access are handled with store context.

q3.question: Can I use existing product barcodes?
q3.answer: Yes. Product create and edit screens support barcode entry and scanner-style input.

q4.question: Do I have to print labels for every product?
q4.answer: No. Label printing is separate and useful when a product needs a custom label.

q5.question: Can external websites connect to Bazaar?
q5.answer: Yes. bazaar API supports product reads and order creation with store-scoped keys.

finalCta.title: Ready to make daily commerce work cleaner?
finalCta.subtitle: Start with products and POS, then connect inventory, purchasing, reports, and integrations.

printingSettings.title: Print settings
printingSettings.subtitle: Receipts, labels, local print agent, and POS auto-print for each store.
printingSettings.wizardDescription: Set up print method, QZ Tray trust, printers, templates, and test printing.
printingSettings.wizardMethodDescription: Choose how this terminal prints receipts and labels.
printingSettings.wizardAgentUnavailable: Bazaar Print Agent is not shown because a real agent provider is not connected in this installation.
printingSettings.wizardConnectionDescription: Check that QZ Tray is running on this device.
printingSettings.wizardTrustDescription: Check certificate, request signing, and local QZ trust separately.
printingSettings.wizardPrintersDescription: Select the receipt printer and label printer for this terminal.
printingSettings.wizardTemplatesDescription: Configure paper size, visible fields, label layout, and preview.
printingSettings.wizardTestDescription: Send a test receipt and test label after choosing printers.
printingSettings.wizardReadyDescription: Auto-print is only ready after QZ is connected, a printer is selected, signing works, and the certificate is trusted locally.
printingSettings.empty: Create a store before setting up printing.
printingSettings.deviceScopeHint: Templates are stored per store; local printer names are saved on this terminal.
printingSettings.readOnly: Read-only. ADMIN and MANAGER can edit printing settings.
printingSettings.browserLimitHint: A normal browser cannot print silently. Auto-print requires a local print service or configured POS terminal.
printingSettings.autoPrintSetupRequired: Auto-print requires a local print service installation. This feature is still being configured.
printingSettings.autoPrintReadyHint: QZ Tray is connected, a printer is selected, signing works, and this terminal trusts the certificate.
printingSettings.autoPrintNeedsClientTrust: Certificate installation required on this terminal
printingSettings.printersSaved: Printer names are saved for this terminal.
printingSettings.qzNotConnected: QZ Tray is not connected. Start QZ Tray on this computer and click “Check connection”.
printingSettings.qzNotInstalled: QZ Tray was not found. Install and start QZ Tray to use auto-print.
printingSettings.qzCertificateError: QZ Tray rejected the print request. Trusted certificate setup is required.
printingSettings.qzPrinterMissing: Select a receipt printer before test printing.
printingSettings.qzPrinterNotFound: The selected printer was not found. Check the printer connection and refresh the list.
printingSettings.qzTimeout: QZ Tray connection timed out. Check that QZ Tray is running.
printingSettings.qzPrintFailed: Could not send the print job. The sale was saved; try printing again.
printingSettings.qzTrustTrusted: Bazaar certificate is loaded and request signing works.
printingSettings.qzTrustMissing: Printing requires confirmation in QZ Tray. Configure a trusted certificate for auto-print without popups.
printingSettings.qzCertificateMissing: The QZ certificate is not configured. Bazaar will send requests as untrusted.
printingSettings.qzSignatureMissing: The QZ private key is not configured. Print requests will not be signed.
printingSettings.qzCertificateMismatch: The QZ certificate and private key do not match. QZ will reject the signature.
printingSettings.qzSigningEndpointFailed: Could not verify QZ signing. Check the certificate and private key environment variables.
printingSettings.qzSetupIntro: To use QZ Tray auto-print, set it up on the cashier computer:
printingSettings.qzCertificateNotice: Production QZ Tray printing requires trusted certificate/signing setup. Until the certificate is configured, QZ Tray may show a system confirmation.
printingSettings.qzCertificateMissingNotice: QZ Tray is connected, but the Bazaar public certificate is not configured. QZ will show Allow/Block and treat the request as anonymous.
printingSettings.qzSignatureMissingNotice: QZ Tray is connected, but server signing is not configured. Add the QZ private key on the server or QZ will show Allow/Block.
printingSettings.qzCertificateMismatchNotice: The Bazaar certificate and QZ_PRIVATE_KEY are not a matching pair. Generate a new pair or check that env contains the matching certificate/private key.
printingSettings.qzClientProvisioned: QZ Tray trusts the Bazaar certificate on this terminal.
printingSettings.qzClientProvisionMissing: The Bazaar certificate is not installed in QZ Tray on this terminal.
printingSettings.qzClientProvisionNotice: Request signing works, but QZ Tray does not trust the Bazaar certificate yet. Install the certificate on this terminal.
printingSettings.qzClientProvisionConfirm: Bazaar certificate is installed in QZ Tray on this terminal
printingSettings.qzClientProvisionHint: Enable only after certificate whitelist/provisioning and a successful test print without Allow/Block.
printingSettings.qzStepInstallCertificate: Install the Bazaar certificate into QZ Tray on this terminal.
printingSettings.qzStepRestart: Restart QZ Tray and make sure its icon is visible in the menu bar or system tray.
printingSettings.qzStepTestPrint: Run a test print and verify QZ does not show Allow/Block.
printingSettings.downloadQzCertificateHint: Install this file into QZ Tray on the cashier computer. The private key is never downloaded and stays server-side.
printingSettings.savedPrinterNotFound: The saved printer was not found. Check the connection or choose another printer.
printingSettings.printerRequired: Select a printer before test printing.
printingSettings.providerDisabledHint: Manual print and PDF continue to work.
printingSettings.providerQzHint: For a cashier computer with QZ Tray installed.

productSettings.title: Product settings
productSettings.description: Configure which fields and checks are used for products in this store.
productSettings.enableSkuHint: When disabled, SKU is hidden in products, POS, inventory, and related forms. Existing SKU values are not deleted.
productSettings.enableBarcodeHint: When disabled, barcodes are hidden in products, POS, inventory, and related forms. Existing barcode values are not deleted.
productSettings.enableSimilarProductCheckHint: When enabled, Bazaar warns about possible duplicates while creating products.
productSettings.storeHint: These settings apply only to the selected store.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Organization access.
users.addUserSubtitle: Create an account and assign a role.
users.name: Name
users.roleHint: The role determines access to sections.
users.storeAccessHint: Select the stores this user can work with.
users.storeAccessReviewHint: Existing non-admin users were kept assigned to current stores to avoid lockouts. Open each user and narrow store access where needed.
users.allStoresByRole: This role can access all organization stores.
users.statusHint: You can disable a user without deleting them.
users.inviteEmailNotSentUseLink: Email was not sent. Send the invite link manually.

summary.userLocaleUpdate: User language: {userEmail} -> {locale, select, ru {RU} kg {KG} en {EN} other {-}}

errors.customerContactRequired: Enter at least a customer email or phone.
errors.customerDuplicate: A customer with this email or phone already exists in this store.
errors.customerDuplicateInFile: Duplicate customer row in the uploaded file.

errors.emailMarketingUnsubscribeSecretMissing: Set EMAIL_UNSUBSCRIBE_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, or JOBS_SECRET before sending campaigns.
errors.emailCampaignAudienceEmpty: No customers with email match this audience.
errors.invalidCurrencyRate: Enter a valid KGS exchange rate for the selected currency.
errors.apiUnauthorized: API token is invalid or revoked.
errors.inventoryBulkSelectionLimit: Too many inventory rows for one request. Save in batches or select fewer rows.
errors.productDeleteBlockedByHistory: This product is already used by sales, purchases, stock movements, stock counts, bundles, or active stock. Archive it instead of deleting it permanently.
errors.inventorySelectionRequired: Select at least one inventory row.
errors.inventorySelectionInvalid: Some selected inventory rows are not available.
errors.productImageStudioJobNotFound: Product image studio job not found
errors.productImageStudioSourceImageMissing: Product image studio source image missing
errors.productImageStudioSourceImageAccessDenie: Product image studio source image access denied

errors.productImageStudioProviderOutputMissing: Product image studio provider output missing

errors.productImageStudioProductRequired: Product image studio product is required.
errors.productNotAvailableInStore: This product is not available in the selected store.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this action.
errors.inventoryAdminRequired: Only an administrator can change stock levels.
errors.duplicateLineItem: This item is already in the order.
errors.accountAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in or reset your password.
errors.emailVerificationDeliveryFailed: Could not send the email confirmation message.
errors.multiOrganizationInviteUnsupported: This email is already attached to another organization. This version does not yet support one account joining multiple organizations.
errors.posDebtStoreMismatch: Debt must be returned from the same store.
errors.posDebtReturnUnsettled: Settle the debt before making a return.
errors.posShiftDifferenceNoteRequired: Add a closing note when counted cash differs from expected cash.
errors.priceTagsBarcodeConfirmationRequired: Price tags barcode confirmation is required.
errors.priceTagsStoreSelectionRequired: Price tags store selection is required.

imports.title: Imports
imports.subtitle: Imports overview

importType.title: Import type
importType.hint: Choose whether this file creates products or customer records.
importType.managerHint: Managers can import customers for stores they can access.

customerImport.uploadHint: Upload a CSV or Excel file with customer contacts.
customerImport.mappingRequired: Map Name and at least Email or Phone.
customerImport.previewEmpty: Upload a file and map fields to preview customer import.
customerImport.hasErrors: Invalid customer rows will be skipped.
customerImport.success: Customer import completed for {count} valid rows.
customerImport.partialImportHint: {valid} valid rows can be imported. {skipped} invalid rows will be skipped.
customerImport.previewInProgressHint: Checking required fields, duplicates, and existing customers in the selected store.
customerImport.importInProgressHint: Writing customers to the selected store. Keep this page open until it finishes.

warnings.customerConflicts: Existing value differs; non-empty existing data is kept.

imports.targetStoreNone: Do not apply to a store
imports.targetStoreHint: Imported products, store prices, and minimum stock settings will be applied to this store only.
imports.dryRunWarningCrossStoreSku: SKU belongs to another store product {product} ({sku}).
imports.dryRunWarningCrossStoreBarcode: Barcode {barcode} belongs to another store product {product} ({sku}).
imports.rowInvalidNumber: Row {row}: {field} must be a number greater than or equal to 0.
imports.rowInvalidInteger: Row {row}: {field} must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.
imports.rowInvalidVariants: Row {row}: variants must be a JSON array of objects with a name field.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Analytics overview
analytics.baseCurrencyNotice: All-store totals are shown in the base accounting currency (KGS). Select one store to view totals in that store's currency.

storesHardware.title: Store hardware
storesHardware.subtitle: Receipt and label printer settings for the current store.
storesHardware.receiptModeHint: Use PDF today, or Connector after the local service is installed.
storesHardware.labelModeHint: Fast label printing uses this saved profile by default.
storesHardware.labelProfileHint: Configure this once. Product list and product detail quick print actions use these defaults.
storesHardware.labelDefaultCopiesHint: Used by quick print unless the action passes a specific copy count.
storesHardware.connectorDeviceHint: Used for receipts and labels in Connector mode.
storesHardware.connectorDeviceMissingHint: Connector mode is selected, but no active device is paired.
storesHardware.pdfModeStep1: Download or open the PDF from quick print.
storesHardware.pdfModeStep2: Select the correct printer in the system print dialog.
storesHardware.pdfModeStep3: For label printers, check media size and use 100% scale.
storesHardware.connectorModeStep1: Install the local Connector on the workstation.
storesHardware.connectorModeStep2: Pair the device with this store.
storesHardware.connectorModeStep3: After pairing, print jobs can be sent directly to the device.
storesHardware.readOnly: Read-only. Editing is available to ADMIN and MANAGER.
